# Space Utilization

> **Type:** Analytics
> **Provenance:** 1P
> **Contexts:** [exhibition-space, exhibitor, finance]
> **Measures:** [exhibition-space-optimization]

## Purpose

Measures how effectively AXPONA monetizes its fixed venue capacity. At 213 listening rooms approaching the physical limit, revenue growth must come from pricing and space type innovation, not capacity expansion. Revenue per sqft is the core value measure.

## Metrics

| Metric | Formula | Dimensions | Refresh |
|--------|---------|------------|---------|
| **revenue_per_sqft** | total_space_revenue / net_sqft | edition, space_type | per-edition |
| **floor_plan_fill_pct** | assigned_spaces / available_spaces | edition, space_type | per-edition (T-90, T-30, show) |
| **listening_room_premium** | avg_listening_room_price / avg_booth_price | edition | per-edition |
| **space_type_mix** | revenue_by_type / total_space_revenue | edition, space_type | per-edition |
| **assignment_velocity** | AVG(days from floor_plan_published to space_assigned) | edition, space_type | per-edition |

## Data Pipeline

```
Bronze                          Silver                          Gold
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Floor plan data           ──▶   dim_space +                  ──▶  v_floor_plan_fill
(tool export / manual)          fct_space_assignment               space_revenue_analysis
```

## Benchmarks

| Segment | Target | Signal |
|---------|--------|--------|
| Overall rev/sqft | > $110 (2025 baseline) | Pricing power being exercised |
| Listening room fill | >= 98% at T-30 | Scarcity driving premium |
| Booth fill | >= 90% | Healthy demand |
| Listening room premium | > 2.0x booth avg | Format innovation valued |

## Capabilities

- space-utilization-analysis
- listening-room-premium-tracking
- space-type-mix-optimization

## Feedback Loop

- **Measured in:** Exhibition Space
- **Consumed by:** Exhibition Space (floor plan design), Exhibitor (pricing), Event (venue evaluation)
- **Drives:** Space type investment (more listening rooms vs. expo), pricing changes, venue capacity planning
- **Maturity path:** descriptive (current) → diagnostic (why do some types underperform?) → prescriptive (optimal floor plan layout)

## Related Patterns

- `exhibition-space-optimization` — the domain pattern being measured
- `maximize-revenue-per-sqft` — the goal pattern this analytics supports
